title: coelorachis glandulosa var. bandanensis
intro: Coelorachis glandulosa var. bandanensis is a variety of the Coelorachis glandulosa plant, a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Coelorachis glandulosa var. bandanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, or used as a decoction in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
